stemHtml: During an IFR flight, who must ensure that altitude corrections for non-standard temperature are applied, and under which temperature conditions?

options.a: PIC is responsible for the temperature correction to be applied, when the temperature is colder than ISA.
options.b: ATC is responsible for the temperature correction to be applied, when the temperature is warmer than ISA.
options.c: ATC is responsible for the temperature correction to be applied, when the temperature is colder than ISA.
options.d: PIC is responsible for the temperature correction to be applied, when the temperature is warmer than ISA.
